subcodes.first_line: God willing, thou hast ever been and wilt ever remain illumined by the lights of guidance and enkindled with the fire of the divine Lote-Tree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله لم یزل و لایزال بانوار هدایت منور باشی و بنار سدره ربانیه مشتعل
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @importance of reading the Sacred Writings, @spiritual transformation
